name: Hoax.ai Technical Quality Gate
governing_principle: Reference quality fails if technical quality is not enforceable. A sovereign reference asset must pass structure, metadata, accessibility, performance, static-security, and dependency checks before it scales.
html_requirements: index.html exists with exactly one H1
no empty href or javascript href
no active tool language outside negation context
metadata_requirements: meta description does not imply active tool
Open Graph tags must not imply active classifier or deployment completion
Twitter tags if present must not overclaim
JSON-LD if present must not use unapproved SoftwareApplication schema
robots_sitemap_requirements: sitemap URLs map to registered eligible routes
no planned blocked future draft or internal_only routes in sitemap
robots must not expose placeholder routes
accessibility_requirements: links have readable text where present
images have alt or are decorative
public_asset_requirements: no references to non-existent public routes
